title: India’s urban health alarm: One in five at early heart risk, 25% face respiratory threat
author: ET Online
short_desc: Urban Indians are facing a health crisis. Cardiovascular and respiratory risks are rising. Poor air quality, long commutes, and inactivity contribute to these issues. Many are overweight or obese. Young adults show early warning signs. Early awareness is crucial for health and financial planning. Th
long_desc: India’s cities may be quietly fuelling a health crisis. One in five urban Indians is already showing early signs of cardiovascular risk, while 25% face heightened respiratory vulnerability, according to a new health risk assessment that flags the cumulative toll of modern urban living.The findings come from CoverRisk, an AI-powered health risk tracking platform by CoverSure, which analysed data from nearly 50,000 individuals across 35 states and union territories over the past six months.Also Read: Healthcare sector can touch $700 bn by 2030, but financing architecture fragmented: ReportThe CoverSure Health Risk Index assigns India’s urban population a composite health risk score of 36.6 on a scale of 0 to 100, with higher scores indicating greater exposure to long-term health risks.The…

title: Zydus Wellness taps Milind Soman as brand ambassador for Glucon-D recharge
author: PTI
short_desc: Zydus Wellness has appointed actor Milind Soman as the brand ambassador for its new product, Glucon-D Recharge. This marks the company's entry into the performance hydration category. Glucon-D Recharge is designed to help Indians stay active consistently. The product is available in ready-to-drink b
long_desc: Zydus Wellness on Thursday announced the appointment of actor Milind Soman as the brand ambassador for its Glucon-D Recharge, with which it entered the performance hydration category.The company has expanded its popular brand Glucon-D into the fast-growing performance hydration category with the launch of Glucon-D Recharge.Also Read: Zydus Wellness 1:5 stock split: Shares start trading ex-split on Thursday With Glucon-D Recharge, we are entering the performance hydration space in a bid to support millions of Indians in staying active, consistently and sustainably,  Zydus Wellness CEO Tarun Arora said.In this journey, he said,  We are delighted to partner with Milind Soman, whose philosophy of mindful, everyday movement reflects the future we envision. Available in both ready-to-drink…
